title: Install LinkedIn Insight Tag and Meta Pixel with conversion tracking

requirements.summary: Install LinkedIn Insight Tag in the frontend HTML with partner ID placeholder, ensuring proper initialization script and noscript fallback pixel
acceptanceCriteria: LinkedIn Insight Tag script is added to frontend/index.html with partner ID placeholder format _linkedin_partner_id = "XXXXXXX"
Script includes proper initialization code and noscript fallback img pixel
Content Security Policy in frontend/public/_headers is updated to allow LinkedIn domains (px.ads.linkedin.com, www.linkedin.com)

file_operations.description: Add LinkedIn Insight Tag script in the <head> section after the existing Google Analytics script. Include the base tracking code with placeholder partner ID (_linkedin_partner_id = "XXXXXXX"), initialization script, and noscript fallback img pixel in the <body> section. Preserve all existing scripts including Google Analytics.

Update the Content-Security-Policy header to include LinkedIn tracking domains. Add 'px.ads.linkedin.com' to script-src and connect-src directives, and add 'www.linkedin.com' to img-src directive. Maintain the existing CSP structure and all current domain allowances.

requirements.summary: Implement LinkedIn conversion tracking for Advisory Application submission with conversion ID placeholder
acceptanceCriteria: LinkedIn conversion tracking pixel fires on successful advisory application submission in SecurityAdvisory.tsx
Conversion event includes placeholder conversion ID format window.lintrk('track', { conversion_id: XXXXXXX })
Tracking only fires after successful form submission, not on page load

file_operations.description: Add LinkedIn conversion tracking after successful form submission in the useSubmitAdvisoryApplication mutation's onSuccess callback. Call window.lintrk('track', { conversion_id: XXXXXXX }) with a placeholder conversion ID. Add TypeScript declaration for window.lintrk if needed. Ensure tracking fires only after successful submission and before navigation to confirmation page.

requirements.summary: Implement LinkedIn conversion tracking for Strategy Call Click with conversion ID placeholder
acceptanceCriteria: LinkedIn conversion tracking pixel fires when strategy call CTA buttons are clicked in Header.tsx and Home.tsx
Conversion event includes placeholder conversion ID
Tracking fires before navigation to Calendly link

file_operations.description: Add LinkedIn conversion tracking to the strategy call CTA button click handler. Fire window.lintrk('track', { conversion_id: XXXXXXX }) with placeholder conversion ID before opening the Calendly link. Ensure tracking completes before navigation.

Add LinkedIn conversion tracking to all strategy call CTA buttons/links on the homepage. Fire window.lintrk('track', { conversion_id: XXXXXXX }) with placeholder conversion ID before navigation to Calendly. Ensure consistent tracking across all strategy call entry points on the page.

requirements.summary: Implement LinkedIn conversion tracking for Toolkit Purchase with conversion ID placeholder and order value
acceptanceCriteria: LinkedIn conversion tracking pixel fires on PaymentSuccess.tsx page load
Conversion event includes placeholder conversion ID and order value if available from URL parameters
Tracking fires only once per successful payment

file_operations.description: Add LinkedIn conversion tracking in a useEffect hook that fires on component mount. Parse URL parameters to extract order value if available using the urlParams utility. Call window.lintrk('track', { conversion_id: XXXXXXX, conversion_value: orderValue }) with placeholder conversion ID and dynamic order value. Use a ref or flag to ensure tracking fires only once per page load.

requirements.summary: Implement LinkedIn conversion tracking for Checklist Download with conversion ID placeholder
acceptanceCriteria: LinkedIn conversion tracking pixel fires on successful checklist download submission in FreeChecklist.tsx
Conversion event includes placeholder conversion ID
Tracking only fires after successful lead capture, not on page load

file_operations.description: Add LinkedIn conversion tracking after successful checklist download submission in the useRecordLeadDownload mutation's onSuccess callback. Call window.lintrk('track', { conversion_id: XXXXXXX }) with placeholder conversion ID. Ensure tracking fires only after successful lead capture and before showing the success state.

requirements.summary: Install Meta Pixel in the frontend HTML with pixel ID placeholder for future ad tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Meta Pixel base code is added to frontend/index.html with pixel ID placeholder format fbq('init', 'XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX')
Script includes proper initialization with fbq('track', 'PageView')
Content Security Policy in frontend/public/_headers is updated to allow Meta domains (connect.facebook.net, www.facebook.com)
Noscript fallback img pixel is included

file_operations.description: Add Meta Pixel script in the <head> section after the LinkedIn Insight Tag. Include the base code with fbq function initialization, fbq('init', 'XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX') with placeholder pixel ID, fbq('track', 'PageView') for automatic page view tracking, and noscript fallback img pixel in the <body> section. Preserve all existing tracking scripts.

Update the Content-Security-Policy header to include Meta/Facebook tracking domains. Add 'connect.facebook.net' to script-src and connect-src directives, and add 'www.facebook.com' to img-src directive. Maintain the existing CSP structure and all current domain allowances including the LinkedIn domains from REQ-1.

requirements.summary: Create setup documentation file explaining how to configure LinkedIn Insight Tag partner ID, conversion IDs, and Meta Pixel ID with step-by-step instructions
acceptanceCriteria: Documentation file TRACKING_SETUP.md is created in frontend directory
Instructions include where to find LinkedIn partner ID and conversion IDs in LinkedIn Campaign Manager
Instructions include where to find Meta Pixel ID in Meta Events Manager
Documentation lists all placeholder values that need replacement and their locations in the codebase

file_operations.description: Create comprehensive documentation for configuring LinkedIn Insight Tag and Meta Pixel. Include sections for: (1) LinkedIn Insight Tag setup with instructions to find partner ID in LinkedIn Campaign Manager and replace XXXXXXX placeholder in index.html; (2) LinkedIn conversion tracking setup with instructions to create conversion events and replace XXXXXXX placeholders in SecurityAdvisory.tsx, Header.tsx, Home.tsx, PaymentSuccess.tsx, and FreeChecklist.tsx; (3) Meta Pixel setup with instructions to find pixel ID in Meta Events Manager and replace XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX placeholder in index.html; (4) verification steps to test that tracking is working; (5) complete reference table listing all placeholder locations and their purposes. Follow the same structure and style as the existing ANALYTICS_SETUP.md file.
